offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delays in vendor onboarding cause missed opportunities for unique supplies. We provide a streamlined onboarding tool instead of manual vendor checks and onboarding processes.
problem: Delays in vendor onboarding and background checks
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try vendor input form and onboarding status tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
